summary: A long Fox & Friends segment combining a SOTU clip of Trump honoring injured child Dalilah Coleman with a studio interview of her family about 'Dalilah's Law.' Carries Fox News chyrons and a news-studio set; a news/interview clip, not a produced music spectacle.
notable_text: Fox News lower-thirds: 'TRUMP HONORS YOUNG GIRL CRITICALLY INJURED BY ILLEGAL MIGRANT TRUCK DRIVER'; 'DALILAH LAW WOULD PROHIBIT STATES FROM ISSUING CDLS TO UNDOCUMENTED DRIVERS'.
